name: How to Add Your Business Listing in LocalPages
description: Learn how to add your business to LocalPages with this step-by-step guide. Increase your online visibility and reach potential customers in your local area.
main_title: How to Add Your Business Listing in LocalPages
richtext:
Are you looking for ways to increase your online presence and attract more customers to your business? One effective way to do so is by adding your business listing to LocalPages.com. In this guide, we'll walk you through the steps of how to add your business listing in LocalPages.com and help you improve your local SEO rankings.

‍

Why Add Your Business Listing to LocalPages?

‍

LocalPages.com is a directory website that attracts millions of visitors each month. Adding your business listing to LocalPages.com can increase your online visibility and improve your local SEO rankings. This reputable and trustworthy website is recognized by search engines such as Google. Additionally, advertising your business on LocalPages.com is completely free. By following the steps outlined in this guide, you can easily add your business listing to LocalPages.com and start attracting more customers to your business. 

‍

Step-by-Step Guide to Add Your Business Listing in LocalPages?

‍

Step 1: Go to LocalPages.com homepage.

Step 2: Once there, click on the ‘Claim Your Listing’ button from the top right corner homepage.

Step 3: If you already have an account with localpages.com, sign in using your username and password. If you don't have an account, create one by updating the contact information.

Step 4: Once your account is created, you will see a button labeled "Add New Listing" Click on it, and it will take you to the business listing page.

Step 5: On the business listing page, you will see a form that asks for your business details. Fill in all the necessary information about your business, such as the name, address, phone number, website, email address, business category, and description. Be sure to provide accurate information as this will help potential customers find your business easily.

Step 6: Review and confirm your listing details, and then click the ‘submit and continue’ button.

Step 7: After filling in the necessary details, LocalPages.com will ask you to verify your business by email or a phone. 

‍

Step 8: Wait for approval - Once you have verified your business, LocalPages.com will review your listing to ensure that it meets their guidelines. This process may take up to a few days, so be patient.

Step 9: If your business listing is approved, you can log in to your account and make any necessary edits to your listing, such as updating your business hours or adding photos.

‍

Congratulations! You have successfully added your business to LocalPages.com, and you can now enjoy increased visibility and exposure to potential customers.

‍
